page_content:
Formerly: HLTH688T.

HLTH654 Communicating in Public Health Leadership (3 Credits)

Offers students an opportunity to understand public health leadership communication in various sectors, assess best practices in public health leadership communication, and how to implement these concepts

in public health leadership communication to develop a confident

and culturally aware voice. The overall aims of the course are to: (a) determine the different organizational communication forms in public health leadership; and (c) practice communication strategies to inform, engage, and persuade individuals within and outside of the organizational structure on various public health issues.
